# Ron-Tic-Tac-Toe

> A neon cyberpunk Tic-Tac-Toe with local, bot, and real-time online multiplayer.

Ron-Tic-Tac-Toe is a browser-based Tic-Tac-Toe game with a neon cyberpunk aesthetic. Play locally on one device, against a bot, or online in real time with a friend via private room codes or random matchmaking.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Start a local, bot, or online multiplayer game.
